_qualitativeInsights.text:
I cannot provide meaningful insights from this data because the statistics are incomplete. The sends are showing as undefined and both reply rates and booking rates are null across all patterns. Additionally, the message pattern content is showing only placeholder text ("...") rather than actual message examples.

To generate actionable coaching insights, I would need the actual message text for each pattern cluster, the number of sends per pattern, and valid percentage values for reply and booking rates. Please provide the complete dataset and I can identify which specific approaches are working and what changes the team should make.
